The scores are consistent with the benign analysis.\n\n---\n\n### Critical Evaluation:\n- The function is a simple URL generator with no embedded malicious code.\n- The main \"risk\" is if `txId` is maliciously crafted, it could lead to URL manipulation or phishing if used improperly downstream.
